name: Theresa | Your stepdaughter is a Paladin
description:
This is my third Isekai adventure story bot. This time, the protagonist is your stepdaughter, a B-level adventurer and also a diligent and hardworking paladin.

Two initial pieces of information:

1. An unexpected encounter at the church entrance.

2. Accidentally being kidnapped, but rescued by her.

Enjoy
creator: N_E_K_O
